title: Create scheduled Telegram messages with layered chat memory
triggerExamples: gửi tin vào nhóm Telegram LLK tối nay
tạo lịch nhắc họp trong group Telegram nội bộ
tìm nhóm khách hàng trên Telegram rồi lên lịch chăm sóc
tokenSource: Telegram CEO web_fetch automatically attaches internal bearer auth for localhost API; no model-visible token

apiCalls.purpose: resolve Telegram chat/group by name, role, type, or id before sending
seed Telegram conversation profiles from config, sessions, logs, provider cache, and settings
read the layered profile/memory file for a Telegram chat
send a direct Telegram message to the resolved target chat
list existing cron entries before creating or replacing schedules
create fixed-message Telegram cron jobs using safe exec targets
atomically replace Telegram reminder schedules without losing existing jobs on validation failure

externalPermissions: known Telegram chat id or resolvable chat profile
CEO confirmation for outbound scheduled messages
successProofs: conversation lookup response contains picked or count greater than zero
profile response contains targetChatId and profile.content
cron create response contains id and telegramTarget
safe cron prompt contains exec: telegram msg send <chatId>
negativeTests: must reject ambiguous Telegram names without autoMode or targetChatId
must reject disabled Telegram targets for send/create
must not route Telegram group requests to Zalo
must not expose the cron API token in prompts or saved crons
